## **Sastre Consulting Ltd** Overview

Sastre Consulting Ltd is a live company located in london, WC2H 9JQ with a Companies House number of 11372210. It operates in the other business support service activities n.e.c. sector, SIC Code 82990. Founded in May 2018, it's largest shareholder is
srs enterprises holding ltd
with a 100% stake. Sastre Consulting Ltd is a young,
micro sized company.
